summary: Autonomous run (/gsd-autonomous --from 26). Phase 26 is fully executed (5/5 plans), verified PASSED (5/5 must-haves), and marked complete (STATE advanced to phase 27). A code review found 2 Critical + 5 Warning findings; the gsd-code-fixer applied fixes for CR-01/CR-02/WR-01/WR-03 but hit the session limit before verifying, committing, or writing REVIEW-FIX.md. The fix changes are in the working tree (both repos build) but are UNCOMMITTED and NOT yet harness-verified.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 26-02 godoll CH-121 kill (UA-derived, uncommitted in ../godoll)
Plan 26-03 wire pinned profile as source of truth + interceptor Sec-Ch-Ua
Plan 26-04 stealth-check command (probe, action, daemon dispatch, raw/json)
Plan 26-05 harness gate (flip KNOWN-RED, consistency/pinned/stealth-check subtests)
Phase 26 verification PASSED (5/5 must-haves, live harness)
Code-fixer applied CR-01/CR-02/WR-01/WR-03 fixes
completed_tasks.progress: Changes APPLIED to working tree (rod-cli + godoll), both repos BUILD. NOT committed, NOT harness-verified, no REVIEW-FIX.md written. Interrupted by session limit.

remaining_tasks.name: Verify + finalize the code-review fixes
remaining_tasks.detail: Rebuild binary (go build -o rod-cli .), kill stale daemons (pkill -9 -x rod-cli), run go test ./tests/ -run TestDetectionHarness -count=1 AND a targeted check that stealth-check reports webdriver=ok on the default page (CR-01). Run go test ./types/ ./actions/ and godoll go test ./stealth/. If green: write 26-REVIEW-FIX.md, commit the rod-cli fix files. godoll changes stay uncommitted by design.

remaining_tasks.name: Continue autonomous: Phase 27 (Canvas/WebGL/WebRTC Hardening)
remaining_tasks.detail: HARDEN-01 (wire EvadeWebRTC/WithWebRTCLeakProtection), HARDEN-02 (replace ApplyCanvasNoise no-op stub, stable-per-session noise). Resume with /gsd-autonomous --from 27 (or discuss/plan/execute phase 27).

remaining_tasks.name: Milestone v1.6 lifecycle: audit -> complete -> cleanup (only after 27-29 done)

blockers.description: Code-review fixes applied but unverified — must re-run the live harness before committing/trusting them

decisions.decision: godoll (../godoll) changes stay UNCOMMITTED in its working tree
decisions.rationale: rod-cli consumes godoll via replace => ../godoll (builds against working tree); phases 24/25 established this pattern. Committing to the separate godoll repo from a rod-cli autonomous run would be a surprising cross-repo side effect.

decisions.decision: Client-Hints spoofing ON by default (profileFromStealth SpoofClientHints=true)
decisions.rationale: Plan 03 switched createPage from FromFingerprint (CH on) to DefaultProfile (CH off), regressing default coherence (empty userAgentData.brands + no Sec-Ch-Ua = a tell) and breaking TestNetworkEvasionHeaders. Restoring CH-on-by-default fulfills the FINGERPRINT-02/03 coherence goal.
The ui-plan-gate false-positives on browser-injection JS; phase 26 is a Go CLI with zero visual UI. Non-blocking per workflow.

uncommitted_files: actions/stealth_check.go (CR-01 fix: accept webdriver undefined/false as PASS)
tests/detection_test.go (CR-01: strengthened stealth_check subtest asserts webdriver PASS)
types/config.go (CR-02 defense-in-depth + WR-03: validator rejects control chars/quotes, platform fail-open tightened)
../godoll/stealth/js.go (CR-02 primary: json.Marshal escaping at JS injection boundary) — SEPARATE REPO, uncommitted by design
../godoll/stealth/{evasion,fingerprint_bridge,export_test}.go + clienthints_derive_test.go (Plan 26-02 + CR-02) — SEPARATE REPO, uncommitted by design
daemon/daemon_more_test.go (PRE-EXISTING at session start, NOT part of phase 26 — do not attribute/commit)
rod-cli.yaml + tests/test_upload.txt (runtime/test artifacts — do NOT commit)
next_action: Run remaining task 12: rebuild binary, kill stale daemons, re-run TestDetectionHarness + a webdriver-ok check + ./types ./actions + godoll ./stealth tests. If green, write 26-REVIEW-FIX.md and commit ONLY the 4 rod-cli fix files (actions/stealth_check.go, tests/detection_test.go, types/config.go, types/context.go). Then continue autonomous from phase 27.
context_notes: Worktrees auto-degraded (#683: HEAD diverged from origin/HEAD) so all execution was sequential on main; branching_strategy=none so commits go to main. Two operational traps hit this session: (1) the tests exec a PREBUILT ../rod-cli binary, so you MUST `go build -o rod-cli .` before running any runCli-based test (stale binary = false failures); (2) `pkill -f <pattern>` self-matches the shell when the pattern string is in your own command — use `pkill -9 -x rod-cli` (exact comm) instead. Do NOT run the full `go test ./...` — it exceeds Go's 10-min default timeout under browser load and includes a pre-existing flaky daemon/daemon_more_test.go::TestStartServerWithPpid. The user's own interactive Chromium (PID ~15166, /usr/lib/chromium) must never be killed — only rod-cli/headless_shell test browsers.
